# Extracao: transcription_mp4_1__Lack_of_Time

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_1__Lack_of_Time.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Lack of time. Lack of time is a reason why people are not getting back with you. You have to figure out how to solve this time problem with this client to put your product, your service, your company back on their agenda. They lack time to call you back, to email you, to respond to your text, your personal business, to make time for another presentation is their problem and now has become your problem. So look for it. Look for creative ways how you can solve this lack of time problem and trust me you can't do that by better product, by explaining the product, by making the product better somehow or by reducing your price. None of those things solve this lack of time issue. You've got to get creative. How do you take time out? Go to them. Quit asking for them to come to you. How do you do this? You send them information. Maybe what you do is you find out or just address overtly the time issue. I know you're busy. I know how busy you get. What can I do to solve your time problem?
